description: Ideal gas laws. Laws of Thermodynamics. Temperature and entropy. Thermodynamic potentials such as free energy and their use. Heat engines and Carnot cycles. Introductory statistical physics: Maxwell and Boltzmann distributions. Microscopic derivations of thermodynamic properties such as heat capacities.
supplementalNotes: • Credit will be granted for only one of PHYS 217, PHYS 317.
title: Introductory Thermodynamics
